page_summary: Map route in the shared BCWS Angular shell. The route appears to depend on shared wildfire incident structures plus directly reachable public ArcGIS overlay layers.
confirmed_summary: The route shares the same Angular shell and bundle as dashboard and list. Public perimeter, forest-service-road safety, and recreation-closure layers are concrete and queryable. The shared bundle also exposes BC geocoder usage.
unresolved_summary: No concrete evacuation service was isolated. The NRS incident and notification hosts remain unresolved from this environment, so those data families remain probable or unresolved.

endpoints.notes: Shared Angular bundle used by dashboard, map, and list.
Shared bundle contains the incident client family and stage-of-control model fields, but hostname did not resolve from this environment.
Notification client family appears in the shared bundle, but hostname did not resolve from this environment.
Shared bundle contains the BC geocoder family for map search interaction, but this pass did not capture a direct live request.
Public ArcGIS feature layer is queryable. Fields include `FIRE_STATUS`, `FIRE_SIZE_HECTARES`, and `FIRE_URL`.
Public ArcGIS point layer is queryable. Domain values include `CLOSURE`, `WARNING`, and `SEASONAL`.
Public ArcGIS point layer is queryable. Fields include `CLOSURE_IND`, `CLOSURE_TYPE`, `CLOSURE_DATE`, and site metadata.

widgets.label: Perimeter map layer
widgets.notes: Directly queryable public polygon layer with `FIRE_STATUS`, size, year, and detail URL fields.

widgets.label: Road-safety overlay
widgets.notes: Verified public point layer with `CLOSURE`, `WARNING`, and `SEASONAL` domain values.

widgets.label: Recreation closures overlay
widgets.notes: Verified public point layer with closure indicators, closure dates, and site metadata.

widgets.label: Evacuation overlay
widgets.notes: No concrete evacuation layer URL was isolated in bounded recon; keep candidate-only until a real service is found.
